name: GridDojo
promise: Clear, tested tutorials and honest comparisons for Excel and Google Sheets — so you can stop fighting your spreadsheet and get back to work.
editorialPolicyHtml:
Every tutorial on GridDojo is written to be tested and actually work — the steps are the steps we followed ourselves, on the current versions of Excel and Google Sheets.

Our comparison and "best software" articles are honest. We tell you who each tool is not for, not just who it is for. When we earn an affiliate commission from a tool we recommend, it never changes the ranking — the best pick is the best pick.

Publish and update dates reflect real changes to the content. We do not bump a date without revising the article. When software changes, we update the guide or retire it — we don't leave outdated steps online.

About authorship: this is an early build of GridDojo, published under our editorial team while we grow. Before any wide launch, articles will carry individual authors with verifiable spreadsheet expertise (E-E-A-T).
